creator: hg@cally.queue.to
text:
guile-gtk-0.41_3, the current x11-toolkits/guile-gtk , does not build 
against the just updated guile-1.8.4 as it requires a flag scm_gc_heap_lock
removed in guile 1.8 per the NEWS file in guile 1.8.  Update needed?

How-To-Repeat: 	
Attempt to build guile-gtk-0.41_3 from a port
